text.title: Laravel Layered Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — keep Eloquent in controller; abstraction tax not justified
skip-this-methodology — use Symfony + hexagonal layout; Laravel patterns fight DDD aggregates

branch.question: Any controller contains Eloquent query or business logic?

conclusion.verdict: extract logic into Service; controller only validates + delegates + wraps in Resource

branch.question: Is there a real abstraction need (multi-source, no-DB testing, query encapsulation)?

conclusion.verdict: add Repository + ADR; keep interface only if a second impl exists
apply remaining rules — DB::transaction closure + validated() + JsonResource boundary

text.example: shape=growing_service_or_api → controller_violation=true → thin-controller-no-eloquent → extract `InvoiceService::create(CreateInvoiceDTO $dto)` before adding any new endpoint.
